channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Toys on verge, 5th March
item.description:
Been there a few days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thames Road, North End, Greater London

item.description:
This chair is obstructing the pavement and has been there a few days

item.title: David miller 3.3.26 Road markings fading, Borough f/up req, 5th March
item.description:
David miller 3.3.26 Road markings fading, Borough f/up req HIGH STREET SIDCUP - STATION ROAD - ELM ROAD - MAIN ROAD
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Station Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large quickly degrading pothole, 5th March
item.description:
This pothole surrounds a drain which bangs continuously due to the excessive traffic and as there are numerous quarry trucks driving over it everyday its degrading quickly and will collapse soon. Also the noise is very disturbing to the families and elderly and everyone that live here. Please sort it out ASAP.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, North Cray Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light was fixed and is now out again !, 5th March
item.description:
This light was fixed after I reported it but is now out again!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Milton Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cracked paving, 5th March
item.description:
The paving has been damaged for a few months. It’s very dangerous for people with mobility aids or pushchairs
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): West Hallowes, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bike blocking pavement, 5th March
item.description:
Lime bikes blocking pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Sadler Place, Homerton, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti on broadband / telephone cable box, 5th March
item.description:
Please can the graffiti on this telephone cable box be removed swiftly.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Copleston Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crystal Palace Parade SE19 on green hoarding a, 5th March
item.description:
Crystal Palace Parade SE19 on green hoarding a bit north of the bus terminus with ‘Crystal Palace High Level Station’ or similar on it is graffiti tagged. This is between to streetlight column ID numbered C115#11 and 13. Google Streetview: https://www.google.com/maps/@51.4219505,-0.0773717,3a,37.9y,98.48h,85.84t/data=!3m7!1e1!3m5!1s6PvrPV__xWORf0-t0yCzEQ!2e0!6shttps:%2F%2Fstreetviewpixels-pa.googleapis.com%2Fv1%2Fthumbnail%3Fcb_client%3Dmaps_sv.tactile%26w%3D900%26h%3D600%26pitch%3D4.161209047320625%26panoid%3D6PvrPV__xWORf0-t0yCzEQ%26yaw%3D98.47890573459561!7i16384!8i8192?authuser=0&entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDMwMi4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crystal Palace High Level Station Subway, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Criclewood Broadway in front of Kebab 49, 5th March
item.description:
Fridge

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crystal Palace Parade about mid way be, 5th March
item.description:
Crystal Palace Parade about mid way between College Road and Farquhar Road junctions is a Safety ‘speed’ Camera. On west side footpath (ie Southwark) in line with this is a black box which is graffiti tagged. Google Streetview shows box: https://www.google.com/maps/@51.4225481,-0.0769798,3a,75y,288.81h,97.47t/data=!3m7!1e1!3m5!1s7-iBG2_Z7eD_Vsj067SB0A!2e0!6shttps:%2F%2Fstreetviewpixels-pa.googleapis.com%2Fv1%2Fthumbnail%3Fcb_client%3Dmaps_sv.tactile%26w%3D900%26h%3D600%26pitch%3D-7.473208828422742%26panoid%3D7-iBG2_Z7eD_Vsj067SB0A%26yaw%3D288.812415298972!7i16384!8i8192?authuser=0&entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDMwMi4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crystal Palace Parade, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollards & lamp column not lit, 5th March
item.description:
The lighting on both bollards on the central island (B175 & ?) and the lamp column (C65) is not working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Pauls Cray Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Numerous potholes around the path, 5th March
item.description:
We have several potholes on tge pathway around King Meadow, thus has been reported last year a couple of times and every time we received a "in progress " reply, but nothing has been done since. A lady has fallen over at one of the potholes last week, as her sight wasn't very good. We really don't want anymore accidents in the park. Could you please repair all potholes on the footpath at Kings Meadow, please? Thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hilldrop Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: High Street (Penge) SE20 7HG outside nu, 5th March
item.description:
High Street (Penge) SE20 7HG outside number 14 – 16 (One Stop shop – next to Oakfield Rd junction) black footpath box (guess controls pedestrian lights) which is graffiti tagged.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31-33, High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping - council cleared up but don't collect, 5th March
item.description:
It's great the council do litter picking but they leave grey bags, this time in corner of Gerda and all up thaxted including with footscray. These have been three weeks and now attract other flytipping and litter. If they do the collecting can they be picked up promptly?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gerda Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple hire bikes blocking footpath everyday, 5th March
item.description:
Multiple hire bikes blocking footpath (x50) all hire firms blocking footpath under bridge on cornwall road and corner of wooton street. this footpath is blocked every hour and every day.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cornwall Road, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Argyle Way, Bermondsey, Greater London

item.title: Trolly left with cardboard, 5th March
item.description:
Supermarket trolley with cardboard on the street. Cardboard now also on the street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Argyle Way, Bermondsey, Greater London

item.title: Flyposter on pavement attached to a pallet outside 71 Blackbrook Lane, 5th March
item.description:
Flyposter on pavement attached to a pallet outside 71 Blackbrook Lane I’m sharing a what3words address to help you find this specific location. Tap to see exactly where it is: ///wage.mimic.fruit https://w3w.co/wage.mimic.fruit

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackbrook Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
